case_title: AMIN, MIKE S. vs. ENGLEHARDT, JOHN A.

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT ENGLEHARDT, JOHN A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENGLEHARDT, JOHN A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 48 - 6TH STREET #32, S.F. $710.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $710.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-07-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN ATTY FEES AND COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PLTF TO ALLOW DEFT UNRESTRICTED ACCESS BY VISITORS ASSISTING WITH MOVEOUT. IF DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 4/7/98 DEFT ENTITLED TO SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLEHARDT, JOHN A.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, MIKE S. AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLEHARDT, JOHN A. SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, MIKE S. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-05-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-11-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ROOM 503A JUDGE PRO-TEM ARNOLD EVJE, SSAWYER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 3:13 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, DAVID MENDEZ APPEARING FOR PLTF, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR REST AND POSS OF THE PREM. LOCATED AT 48-6TH ST, #32, SF, CA, FOR $710 MONEY JUDGMENT. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL AFTER 4/7/98. IF DEFT VACATES JUDGMENT WILL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL AND NO MONEY OWED. PLTF. ALLOWED UNRESTRICTED ACCESS TO PREM. AGREED TO NO OTHER OCCUPANTS, MUTUAL RELEASE OF ANY CLAIMS, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/FEES, PLTF, WILL ALLOW AS MANY PEOPLE TO THE PROPERTY FOR MOVING PURPOSES DURING NORMAL HOURS. DEFT AGREED TO THE TERMS AND IS PREPARED TO SIGN THIS AGREEMENT IF SENT TO HIM. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
